_comment: User-level MCP servers for Claude Code (web + local). Bootstrapped into every session via ~/.claude/mcp.json symlink → this file. Only REMOTE (http/sse) MCPs work in Claude Code web sandboxes; local stdio MCPs must stay in a separate local-only config. claude.ai → Settings → Connectors does NOT inject into Claude Code sandboxes (verified April 2026), so anything needed in coding sessions lives HERE.
